entity.summary: Fully on-chain order-book decentralized exchange supporting spot trading, price-time-priority matching, multiple order types, contract-based trade execution, HTTP and WebSocket market-data interfaces, and liquidity integrations.
entity.notes: Current first-party website exposes Etherlink, Monad, and Base exchange surfaces. First-party documentation describes a fully on-chain CLOB exchange with contract execution, price-time-priority matching, spot trading, LP vaults, and mainnet HTTP/WebSocket APIs.

evidence.title: About Hanji
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies Hanji as a fully on-chain order-book exchange and describes spot trading, decentralized matching, composability, and the protocol architecture.

evidence.title: Hanji Order Book
evidence.notes: Current first-party order-book documentation describes fully on-chain order placement and matching, price-time priority, unbounded simultaneous orders, and exchange price precision.

evidence.title: Hanji API Documentation
evidence.notes: Current first-party API documentation publishes contract, HTTP, and WebSocket interfaces and mainnet endpoints for Etherlink, Monad, and Base exchange deployments.
